hooks.command: filepath=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$filepath" == *.py ]] && [[ "$filepath" == */app/backend/* ]]; then cd app/backend && uv run ruff format "$filepath" && uv run ruff check --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; fi

filepath=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$filepath" == *.env ]] || [[ "$filepath" == *.env.* && "$filepath" != *.env.example ]] || [[ "$filepath" == */bun.lock ]] || [[ "$filepath" == */uv.lock ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env or lock files directly' >&2; exit 2; fi
